changeSet.author: P35066
P44065
changeSet.sql: delete from request_task_action_type where code = 'PAYMENT_CANCEL'; delete from request_task_action_type where code = 'RFI_CANCEL';

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: insert into request_task_action_type(id, code, blocked_by_payment) values (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'CANCEL_APPLICATION', false);

changeSet.author: P44065
P44065
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.request_task_type (id, code, assignable, expiration_key, supporting, request_type_id) VALUES(nextval('request_task_type_seq'), 'NEW_VERIFICATION_BODY_SYSTEM_NOTIFICATION', false, null, null, (SELECT id FROM public.request_type WHERE code = 'SYSTEM_MESSAGE_NOTIFICATION'));

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.request_task_type (id, code, assignable, expiration_key, supporting, request_type_id) VALUES(nextval('request_task_type_seq'), 'VERIFICATION_BODY_NO_LONGER_AVAILABLE_SYSTEM_NOTIFICATION', false, null, null, (SELECT id FROM public.request_type WHERE code = 'SYSTEM_MESSAGE_NOTIFICATION'));

changeSet.author: P44065
